overall.description: A first-person walk through a luxurious futuristic penthouse or corporate suite in Cyberpunk 2077, beginning in a dark corridor with red neon floor accents, passing a reception desk with a holographic display, and ending at panoramic windows overlooking a coastal cityscape and offshore industrial platforms during golden hour.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark luxury corridor with red neon floor accents

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down a dimly lit corridor illuminated by vertical red neon strips embedded in the floor

entered.detail: vertical red neon light strips embedded in the polished dark floor running the length of the corridor
large glowing circular holographic artwork or logo mounted on the far wall at the end of the corridor
dark polished marble or stone wall panels lining the corridor sides

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, luxurious corridor with dark marble walls and red neon floor lighting. The camera moves forward toward a circular holographic display glowing at the far end, creating a moody, cyberpunk atmosphere with reflective surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: reception lobby with security desk and holographic art

events.description: approaching the illuminated reception area where warm interior lighting mixes with the dark corridor ambiance

agents.ego_description: approaching the reception desk while the circular holographic display becomes more prominent on the left

notable_agents.action: security guard or receptionist standing behind the desk facing the entrance

entered.detail: modern illuminated reception counter with a figure standing behind it
decorative geometric wooden or metal wall panels with warm backlighting behind the reception desk

segments.scene_description: The corridor opens into a reception area with a security desk on the right featuring geometric wall panels and warm lighting. The circular holographic display shifts to the left as the camera approaches, and a security figure stands behind the desk.

scene_state.functional_zone: window gallery transitioning from interior to exterior view

events.description: turning right away from the reception desk toward the large windows, exiting the enclosed corridor into the sunlit gallery space
dramatic shift from artificial darkness to bright golden hour sunlight flooding through floor-to-ceiling windows

agents.ego_description: turning toward the windows and walking along the glass wall as the outside city view gradually comes into sight

entered.detail: tall panoramic windows with horizontal blinds revealing the outside cityscape
horizontal slatted blinds partially covering the upper windows
tall potted palm or tropical plants placed near the windows

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right toward massive windows where golden sunlight floods the space, transitioning from the dark interior to a bright gallery. The red neon lights and corridor walls fall behind as floor-to-ceiling windows and potted plants come into view, with the cityscape beginning to appear in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: panoramic viewing gallery overlooking coastal city and harbor

events.description: full reveal of the offshore industrial platforms and expansive city skyline as camera approaches the glass

agents.ego_description: walking slowly along the windows taking in the panoramic view of the coastal city, harbor, and distant industrial platforms

entered.detail: futuristic high-rise buildings and skyscrapers of the coastal city visible through the windows
body of water with reflections of the golden hour sunlight
large circular offshore industrial platform or structure in the distance with smokestacks
tall palm tree visible just outside the window on the balcony

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals a breathtaking panoramic view through the windows, showcasing a futuristic coastal cityscape with towering skyscrapers, a calm harbor, and massive offshore industrial platforms in the distance. The golden hour light bathes the scene as the camera moves along the window wall, with palm trees visible on the exterior balcony.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a moody, neon-lit interior into a bright, expansive panoramic view of a futuristic coast. It begins in a narrow corridor of dark marble and red neon floor lighting, moving forward toward a glowing circular holographic display. As the space opens into a reception area, the camera passes a security desk and geometric wall panels while the holographic display shifts to the left. The scene then transitions from the dark interior to a bright gallery as the camera turns right, leaving the red neon behind to encounter floor-to-ceiling windows and potted plants flooded with golden sunlight. Finally, the view expands into a breathtaking panorama of a coastal cityscape with towering skyscrapers and offshore industrial platforms bathed in the warm glow of the golden hour.
